recommendations.title: Selfie

recommendations.director: Tristan Aurouet, Marc Fitoussi, Cyril Gelblat, Vianney Lebasque, Thomas Bidegain

recommendations.title: Wakefield
recommendations.overview: A man's nervous breakdown causes him to leave his wife and live in his attic for several months.

recommendations.title: Now, Voyager
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a nervous breakdown and an oppressive mother before being freed by the love of a man she meets on a cruise.

recommendations.title: A Whole New Life
recommendations.overview: Gianni is a taxi driver dissatisfied with his life. One day by chance he gets the opportunity to take possession of the villa and life of a billionaire on holiday.

recommendations.title: A Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journali

recommendations.title: The Fifth Element
recommendations.overview: In 2257, a taxi driver is unintentionally given the task of saving a young girl who is part of the key that will ensure the survival of humanity.

recommendations.title: Piku
recommendations.overview: A taxi driver is caught between a dysfunctional relationship between a woman and her father as he drives them to Kolkata.

recommendations.title: My Fake Boyfriend

recommendations.title: Bottle Rocket
